allow: PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\jknau\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-jknau-OneDrive-Documents-GitHub-greekshipgame\\a0911e5a-f30e-4d77-848e-69d2850e2eef\\scratchpad"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$sp\\map.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(176, 140, 560, 320\); $crop = $src.Clone\($rect, $src.PixelFormat\); $big = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1120, 640\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($big\); $g.InterpolationMode = "NearestNeighbor"; $g.PixelOffsetMode = "Half"; $g.DrawImage\($crop, 0, 0, 1120, 640\); $big.Save\("$sp\\map_zoom.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "done")

PowerShell($f = "c:\\Users\\jknau\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\greekshipgame\\js\\portScene.js"; $c = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f\); $c = $c.Replace\("// Where the moored deck sits on the port screen.`r`nconst PORT_DECK_X = 262, PORT_DECK_Y = 122;", ""\).Replace\("// Where the moored deck sits on the port screen.`nconst PORT_DECK_X = 262, PORT_DECK_Y = 122;", ""\); $c = $c.Replace\("PORT_DECK_X", "this.deckX"\).Replace\("PORT_DECK_Y", "this.deckY"\); $c = $c.Replace\("    buildDeck\(\);`n    CrewUI.panelAnchor", "    buildDeck\(\);`n    // Moor the deck against the pier, whatever her size.`n    this.deckX = Math.min\(262, VIRTUAL_W - DECK.W - 8\);`n    this.deckY = Math.min\(122, 196 - DECK.H\);`n    CrewUI.panelAnchor"\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($f, $c\); Select-String -Path $f -Pattern "deckX|deckY" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line)
